text:
CGI::FCKeditor is FCKeditor(http://www.fckeditor.net/) Controller for Perl OOP.
FCKeditor(http://www.fckeditor.net/) is necessary though it is natural.

Author:	Kazuma Shiraiwa <cyberlib@gmail.com>
